emails.subject: Extend Deal
emails.body: Chris, Hey, Scott is out of the office, so I'm sending this to you. By the way, I didn't know you were a STAR!!! I caught you on Nightline last night. You were right up there with Ken Lay. Sherry Forwarded by Sherry Anastas/HOU/ECT on 06/05/2001 10:03 AM Sherry Anastas 06/05/2001 10:02 AM

emails.subject: RE: Extend Deal
emails.body: RE: Extend Deal Extended to 5/31/2001. What was I doing on niteline??? I hope I wasn't doing something embarrissssssing.

emails.subject: Extend Deal
emails.body: Extend Deal Chris, Please extend this deal to 12/31/00. We had gas flow from 12/22/00 12/31/00. Thanks, Sherry

emails.subject: RE: Extend Deal
emails.body: RE: Extend Deal done To: Germany, Chris
